benefits.description: Garmin sleep scores consistently much higher than normally achievable while on cycle

side_effects.description: Sleep improvements were short-lived after travel disrupted sleep schedule post-cycle

protocol_notes: Experimented with both 5mg and 500mcg doses; did not notice a difference between them. Also experimented with morning vs. night dosing without noticing a difference in sleep benefit. Generally stuck to 250-500mcg in the morning followed by sun exposure. Effect was short-lived after post-cycle travel. Plans to run another cycle.
